gm_output.player_facing_text: Cinderwatch's eastern gate looms before Galinor, rain pattering against the soot-dark stone as crowds press forward. Caravans and refugees mingle in a chokehold of muddy foot traffic, while guards survey the scene with tense vigilance. Above, frayed banners rustle in the gusts of wind, half-hearted symbols of authority amidst the chaos. A notice board nearby lists fresh taxes, new curfews, and a warning about a missing patrol, while a tavern runner calls out offers of hot stew and paid rumor, promising warmth against the cold rain. Amidst the masses, a figure in threadbare clothes stands motionless, darting glances toward the shifting crowd, their intent unclear.

A figure in threadbare clothes stands still, observing the crowd.
